scripts.build: bun run --cwd ../web build:desktop && bun build ./src/main.ts ./src/preload.ts --outdir ./dist --target=node --external electron && bun -e "import { cpSync, mkdirSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; const root = process.cwd(); const source = path.join(root, '../web/dist'); const target = path.join(root, 'dist/renderer'); rmSync(target, { recursive: true, force: true }); mkdirSync(path.dirname(target), { recursive: true }); cpSync(source, target, { recursive: true });"
